tools.name: retention_source_status
tools.description: Inspect Worklin's Shopify + Klaviyo retention source posture. Returns connector status, freshness caveats, approval posture, and blocked live-action capabilities.

klaviyo_account.description: Optional saved Klaviyo account label to inspect.

klaviyo_connection_id.description: Optional saved Klaviyo credential ID to inspect.

brand_name.description: Optional brand name supplied during conversational onboarding. Accepted as context and ignored for source posture.

website_url.description: Optional brand website/domain supplied during conversational onboarding. Accepted as context and ignored for source posture.

tools.name: retention_connect_klaviyo
tools.description: Open Worklin's secure key prompt to validate and store a read-only Klaviyo Private API Key for one account. The key never enters chat and is retained for recurring audits. Uses GET-only Klaviyo API calls and registers no send, schedule, flow activation, profile mutation, or segment mutation capability.

account_label.description: Optional human label for this Klaviyo account, useful when managing multiple brands.

revision.description: Optional Klaviyo API revision. Defaults to Worklin's tested revision.

tools.name: retention_list_klaviyo_accounts
tools.description: List saved Worklin Klaviyo account connections without exposing secrets. Use this before selecting a specific account for an audit.

tools.name: retention_brand_brain
tools.description: Return Worklin's compact Brand Brain context for onboarding, audits, and campaign work: positioning, website/domain, voice, offers, products, rules, CTAs, audience notes, compliance, document/source provenance, readiness, campaign memory, caveats, and safety metadata.

brand_name.description: Optional brand name provided during conversational onboarding.

website_url.description: Optional brand website/domain provided during conversational onboarding.

klaviyo_account.description: Optional saved Klaviyo account label to use when building the Brain around a connected account.

klaviyo_connection_id.description: Optional saved Klaviyo credential ID to use when building the Brain around a connected account.

tools.name: retention_shopify_snapshot
tools.description: Build a read-only Shopify retention snapshot for customers, orders, cohorts, LTV, AOV, product affinity, and replenishment windows. No Shopify writes are available.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 90.

limit.description: Maximum customers to evaluate. Defaults to 200.

klaviyo_account.description: Optional saved Klaviyo account label to use.

klaviyo_connection_id.description: Optional saved Klaviyo credential ID to use.

tools.name: retention_klaviyo_snapshot
tools.description: Build a read-only Klaviyo retention snapshot for profiles, lists, segments, campaigns, flows, metrics, engagement, and lifecycle coverage. No send/schedule/mutation is available.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 90.

limit.description: Maximum customers to evaluate. Defaults to 200.

klaviyo_account.description: Optional saved Klaviyo account label to use.

klaviyo_connection_id.description: Optional saved Klaviyo credential ID to use.

tools.name: retention_unified_customer_view
tools.description: Resolve Shopify customers and Klaviyo profiles into Worklin unified customer identities with confidence, source coverage, missing data, and caveats.

limit.description: Maximum identities to evaluate. Defaults to 200.

tools.name: retention_compute_customer_features
tools.description: Compute Worklin customer retention features from unified Shopify + Klaviyo signals with freshness caveats and safety metadata.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 90.

limit.description: Maximum customers to evaluate. Defaults to 200.

tools.name: retention_score_customers
tools.description: Score customers for churn risk, replenishment readiness, winback readiness, VIP likelihood, second-purchase opportunity, suppression risk, fatigue risk, and affinity.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 90.

limit.description: Maximum customers to evaluate. Defaults to 200.

tools.name: retention_build_micro_segments
tools.description: Build definition-only micro-segment candidates from Worklin retention scores and labels. Does not create or mutate Klaviyo segments.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 90.

limit.description: Maximum customers to evaluate. Defaults to 200.

tools.name: retention_find_missing_pieces
tools.description: Detect missing Shopify/Klaviyo/identity/brand retention pieces such as lifecycle gaps, unmatched profiles, weak source coverage, and safety blockers.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 90.

limit.description: Maximum customers to evaluate. Defaults to 200.

tools.name: retention_find_campaign_opportunities
tools.description: Rank Worklin retention opportunities across replenishment, winback, lifecycle gaps, suppressions, and review items. Returns draft-only safety metadata.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 90.

limit.description: Maximum customers to evaluate. Defaults to 200.

tools.name: retention_generate_campaign_package
tools.description: Generate an artifact-only campaign package from a Worklin retention opportunity. Includes audience, angle, brief, subject lines, offer guidance, suppression notes, approval posture, and safety metadata.

opportunity_key.description: Optional opportunity key to package. Defaults to the top opportunity.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 90.

limit.description: Maximum customers to evaluate. Defaults to 200.

tools.name: retention_generate_micro_campaign_package
tools.description: Compatibility alias for retention_generate_campaign_package. Generates an artifact-only campaign package and does not create external drafts.

tools.name: retention_run_qa
tools.description: Run Worklin retention QA over an artifact-only package, checking source freshness, approval requirement, suppression posture, and no-live-action guarantees.

opportunity_key.description: Optional opportunity key to QA. Defaults to the top opportunity.

tools.name: retention_run_retention_qa
tools.description: Compatibility alias for retention_run_qa.

tools.name: retention_create_klaviyo_draft
tools.description: Create a Klaviyo draft-only artifact after future Worklin approval and credential adapter support. This milestone fails closed and never sends or schedules.

package_id.description: Future retained package ID to draft from.

tools.name: retention_audit_status
tools.description: Check whether Worklin has enough Shopify + Klaviyo source posture to run a deep retention audit. Read-only; does not contact or mutate external systems.

tools.name: retention_schedule_audit
tools.description: Return Worklin's recommended recurring audit plan: weekly opportunity scan, monthly deep refresh, and quarterly strategy review. Plan-only; does not create external cron jobs.

tools.name: retention_generate_audit_artifact
tools.description: Generate the Worklin Deep Retention Audit artifact payload with structured chart specs, visible auditTrace reasoning, markdown narrative, provenance, and no-live-action safety metadata.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 365.

cadence.description: Audit run mode. Defaults to first_run.

klaviyo_account.description: Optional saved Klaviyo account label to use.

klaviyo_connection_id.description: Optional saved Klaviyo credential ID to use.

brand_name.description: Optional brand name to apply to the audit artifact.

website_url.description: Optional brand website URL to include in audit context and provenance.

tools.name: retention_deep_audit
tools.description: Run Worklin's retention audit. With a saved Klaviyo connection, generate a real Klaviyo-only L365 account audit without requiring Shopify. With full Shopify + Klaviyo coverage, generate the commerce/product deep audit. Never invent product, revenue, segment, flow, or opportunity data from fixtures for a real client. Artifact-only and read-only.

timeframe_days.description: Retention lookback window in days. Defaults to 365.

cadence.description: Audit run mode. Defaults to first_run.

limit.description: Maximum customers to evaluate for customer-level retention context. Defaults to 200.

klaviyo_account.description: Optional saved Klaviyo account label to use.

klaviyo_connection_id.description: Optional saved Klaviyo credential ID to use.

brand_name.description: Optional brand name to apply to the audit.

website_url.description: Optional brand website URL to include in audit context and provenance.

allow_fixture_data.description: Internal demo/testing only. Never set this for a real client audit.

demo_mode.description: Alias for allow_fixture_data for explicit sample/demo audits only.

tools.name: retention_context_pack
tools.description: Build a compact, safe Worklin retention context pack for chat responses and artifact generation.

tools.name: retention_audit
tools.description: Compatibility alias for retention_deep_audit. A saved Klaviyo connection can produce the real Klaviyo-only L365 account audit; Shopify is optional commerce enrichment. Fixture/sample data is allowed only with explicit allow_fixture_data:true or demo_mode:true.

allow_fixture_data.description: Internal demo/testing only. Never set this for a real client audit.

demo_mode.description: Alias for allow_fixture_data for explicit sample/demo audits only.
